3278260.name: Lucipurr
3278260.description:
The Disappearance and the Cult

It started with a few missing persons. Then, silence. Now, a rescue team is dispatched to a forgotten town only to uncover something far more terrifying than a simple disappearance:

A secret cult obsessed with the mysterious power cats hold over the human mind.

Ancient Power, Twisted Ritual

The cult seeks to exploit the natural affection people feel toward cats. Using enchanted stones stolen from a long-lost Egyptian temple of Bastet, they perform a dark ritual to harness this power.

To protect it, they’ve cursed a cat, twisting it into a demonic guardian known as Lucipurr.

Save the Cats, Break the Ritual

AI-controlled cultists prowl the area, capturing small cats and dragging them to the ritual site to trap their souls. With each soul, the ritual advances. If it is completed before the full moon, Lucipurr will reach its final, unstoppable form.

Your mission: explore the haunted town, rescue the cats, sabotage the ritual, and survive.

Lucipurr’s Hunt and Weaknesses

Lucipurr, who starts off weak and erratic but becomes more dangerous as the ritual progresses.

Lucipurr may be a demonic force, but it still follows feline instincts: it sharpens its claws before a hunt, avoids water, cares about cleanliness, and sometimes sleeps.

Players can use these behaviors to survive the night.

The Full Moon

The game features a ritual progress bar that fills over time. If the cult manages to trap enough cat souls before the full moon, the ritual completes and Lucipurr reaches its full power.

At that point, survival becomes nearly impossible, and the players must make one final desperate attempt to escape the town.
3278260.supported_languages:
英语*, 土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
